runners.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 390m at Q Lakeside behind Art Of Deception beaten 12 lengths (22.54). Should prove hard to beat.

runners.formComment: Nearing another win after his success on March 24 at Q Lakeside over 352m. Last start was sixth over 390m in 22.48, behind Nina Siyan. Solid claims this line-up.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (19.27) when eighth over 350m at this track in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and two places from seven starts. Can hit the frame with the right run.

runners.formComment: Returns from a 12 weeks spell after being tipped out on the back of a seventh (22.61) over 366m at Capalaba. Yet to win but has placed from two first-up runs. Rates well and expect him to be prominent.
